_doc: Items quarantined from the MERCH book (positions.json / watch / screen) — farming inputs, loot, personal-use consumables. Their events STAY in fills.json (full audit); this only filters the derived merch views. A transaction on an ignored item is shown as a real flip ONLY if it matches a `greenlisted` entry (id + price within ±3% + ts within ±6h) — the agent appends one when Ben confirms a recommended flip of an ignored item. See pipeline/lib/ignored.mjs + FILLS-PIPELINE.md. NOTE (Ben, 2026-07-08): quarantine is a VIEW filter ONLY — it does NOT gag pricing help. Freely give Ben buy/sell PRICE recommendations on an ignored item (he still transacts them — farming buys, personal use); run windowrange/quote and quote a level just as you would a flip. The ONLY gated action is greenlisting/LOGGING one as a flip (that still needs a confirmed recommended flip). Do not silently withhold pricing because an item is on this list.
